meaning: n.(一种射击战车的)火箭筒
examples: Great Job! Bazooka really compliments RX-78.
A good devil a Christmas, but we love the weapons. but bazooka.
If you use the proverbial bazooka to kill cockroaches, then who CARES?
Topps stays afloat on its slowly growing confectionery business--Bazooka Bubble Gum and Ring Pops.
They need a really big bazooka, but show little sign of coming up with one.
